conventions.ticks: all frame values are simulation ticks (60/s)
conventions.Startup: first hitbox/throwbox start_tick within the state
conventions.IASA: explicit iasa_at if set; otherwise state is interruptible at anim_length-1 (computed). iasa_on_hit (earlier cancel when the move connects/blocks) is listed in Notes
conventions.Active: tick range(s) the hitbox is live: start_tick..start_tick+active_ticks-1; 'always_on' = until state ends; 'looping' = re-hits on a cycle
conventions.Damage: raw hitbox damage; parenthesis = damage_in_combo; overlapping same-group boxes deal ONE hit (value depends on which box connects)
conventions.super_bars: super_level_ N costs N full bars (125 meter each, max 9 bars)

moves.Notes: Grounded jab. iasa_on_hit 6. Chains/hit-cancels into Swipe2, attacks, specials, supers, Jump. Data input: y=-1 redirects to SwipeUp, y=1 redirects to SwipeDown. Without initiative startup is +1 tick (lag). IS_FAST_SWIPE: juke speed cut to 25% during it. Hitstun 9 (7 combo), knockback 7.0 slightly up. Forward step force 8 on enter.
Identical to Swipe; only reachable from the 'Swipe2' cancel category (Swipe interrupts/hit-cancels into it) and it can chain into itself repeatedly. iasa_on_hit 6.

Hits LOW (hit_height 2). Also reachable via Swipe with down input. iasa_on_hit 12. Knockdown (does not extend hitstun), DI modifier 0.5, knockback 7 pulling inward-up (dir -1.0,-0.65), launches grounded opponents. Forward step force 7 at tick 2. Hitstun 20.

NOT a separate menu button (no interrupt_from); reached only via Swipe with up input. Anti-air launcher: hitstun 24, knockback 6 at dir_y -0.6, launches grounded. iasa_on_hit 7. Cannot be block-cancelled by opponent (block_cancel_allowed false), beats_grab false.
Lunging claw: forward force 13 at tick 5 (plus 4 on enter). iasa_on_hit 9. +1 on hit, DI modifier 0.5, knockback 11.5. Hitstun 13.

moves.Damage: 19 per hit, multi-hit; final hit launches
moves.Notes: Rising drill: launches self up-forward (force (0.2,-1)x5.5 at tick 4, custom gravity 0.5). Vacuum hitboxes (pull in), chip x1.75, SDI 0.3 (0.7 on finisher), +1 per hit, parry_meter_gain 33, block_cancel not allowed. Finisher knockback 8 launch_reversible. land_cancel into ShredLandCancel which has its own 19 dmg launcher hitbox on tick 1 (active 1). force_air_juke (can up-juke from ground).
Hits LOW. Hard knockdown, -3 on hit (plus_frames -3), forward force 7 at tick 9. Hit-cancels only into specials/supers.

Hop kick (force (0.4,-0.7)x7 at tick 2): hits HIGH (hit_height 0), +2 on hit, launcher (dir_y -0.4, kb 7.5), hitstun 22 (18 combo). iasa_on_hit 18. land_cancel with 4 landing recovery. force_air_juke. Head hurtbox extended ticks 6-14.
GUARD BREAK (beats block), hits HIGH. iasa_on_hit 19. Knockdown slam (dir_y 1.0, kb 10), hitstun 25. Steps forward ticks 5-11 (3/tick). PROJECTILE INVULN frames 4-13. +1 on hit.

moves.Damage: 19 per hit, multi-hit; final hit launches
moves.Notes: Aerial drill, custom gravity 0.5. Vacuum, chip x1.75, +1 per hit, no pushback (pushback_x 0), hitstun 15. iasa_on_hit 21. Finisher kb 8 launch_reversible. land_cancel into ShredLandCancel (19 dmg launcher on landing).
iasa_on_hit 9, hits HIGH, +1, launcher (dir_y -0.70, kb 8), hitstun 19. land_cancel from tick 5. On hit OR block Mutant pops up (self vel y = -7) enabling air followups.
Air spike: dir_y 1.0 (sends DOWN), kb 7.5, knockdown, hits HIGH, +2, hitstun 22. iasa_on_hit 13. Forward force 5 at tick 5. land_cancel with 4 recovery.

Detect box under Mutant (type Detect). Touching a projectile or fighter triggers a bounce jump aimed by data x/y (jump force 10 off projectiles, 5 off fighters) into ProjectileGrabJump: 67 dmg spike hitbox ticks 1-3, dir_y 1.0, DI mod 1.5, +2, hitstun 28, can air-ground-bounce. PROJECTILE INVULN frames 5-16. land_cancel from tick 6. force_feintable, no end feint.

moves.Damage: 60 hits into 110 finisher (overlapping boxes, one per group)
moves.Notes: Only from dash states (category ForwardDashAttack: DashForward, Air Dash, Slop Dash). Big enter force 13 forward, then (1,-2)x4 at tick 7. iasa_on_hit 25. Finisher: +2, kb 16, SDI 0.25, WALL SLAM. SDI 0.5 on early hits. land_cancel min frame 9, recovery 6. PROJECTILE INVULN frames 0-6, no gravity frames 0-6. force_air_juke. Inputting backward instead redirects to Back Swing.

selectable=false: auto variant of Dash Attack when aimed opposite to facing. Retreating launcher: hops back (-1.5,-0.5)x5.5 at tick 1, hit sends up-back (dir -1.0,-0.70, kb 8), hitstun 24, +1, hits HIGH, block_cancel not allowed. land recovery 8. Stops colliding with opponent during.

Only from dash (ForwardDashAttack category). GUARD BREAK. Dashes THROUGH the opponent: collision off until tick 10, turns around at frame 6, tracks crossup if opponent moves (ticks 4-11). Hitstun 25. iasa_on_hit 17. No gravity until frame 13.

moves.Startup: 18 (projectile spawn); spike erupts 21 ticks later (~39 total)
moves.Active: spike hitboxes: ticks 21-26 of projectile (center 17x17 at spike, satellites at x-35 and x-60)
moves.Notes: Spawns aimable spike trap at (18,-20): data x/y sets throw direction (push 10 forward + 9 toward aim) and spin. Erupts for 120 dmg, hitstun 21 (15 combo), +2, victim hitlag 10. Spike is DISABLED if Mutant's melee gets blocked, Mutant gets launched, or via the spike_enabled extra-param toggle. In combos: 4 ticks added lag grounded; air-combo version skips to tick 5 and becomes interruptible at tick 18. self_interruptable false.

ANTI-AIR ONLY: hits_vs_grounded=false on every box. Leaps forward-up at frame 9 (force (13,-13), x0.75 airborne / x0.85 grounded). -4 plus frames, hitstun 16, kb 9, can_clash false. Hit-cancels into specials/supers (not another Leap Slash). Data x=0 redirects to AcidSlashJUp (straight-up version, force (5,-16), same numbers, vertical column boxes). force_air_juke. uses_air_movement.

moves.Active: 10-15 (5 boxes in vertical column up to y-80)
moves.Notes: selectable=false: auto variant of Leap Slash when aimed straight up (data.x==0). Anti-air only (hits_vs_grounded false), -4, hitstun 16, kb 9. Does NOT itself consume an air movement (uses_air_movement unset on this node).

Aerial dive slash: force (0.15,1.0)x13 at tick 9 (plunges). GUARD BREAK. +1, hitstun 17, spikes hard down (dir_y 2.20, kb 12). iasa_on_hit 18. land_cancel from tick 6. Hit-cancels into specials/supers.

Huge horizontal slash: lunge force 10 at tick 10 (suppressed during neutral juke). Hitstun 46 (25 in combo) - massive on raw hit. +2, kb 9 slightly up, launch_reversible. iasa_on_hit 23, land_cancel min frame 23. Long extended limb hurtbox (52 wide) from tick 13.

moves.Active: 11-37 looping (3 active / 1 inactive per cycle, 2 boxes)
moves.Damage: 17 per hit (15 in combo, min 3), multi-hit drill
moves.Notes: 360-degree aimable drill (data x/y): drifts with custom gravity 0.25 until frame 6, then flies at speed 11 in aimed direction from frame 6-10 onward (hitbox+hurtbox rotated to aim). +2 per hit, chip x1.25, SDI 0.5, hitstun 19. iasa_on_hit 24 (NOT on block). allow_framecheat during first 25 ticks. Landing while descending after tick 14 cancels to Landing. uses_air_movement, force_air_juke.

moves.Damage: 70 (min 15) close hit; traveling wave 75 (60 in combo)
moves.Notes: Grounded slam: close hitbox DI 0.8 / SDI 0.1, hitstun 16, block_cancel not allowed; spawns ground wave at x+30 (75 dmg, +2, hitstun 16, low-profile boxes). Only ONE wave at a time (unusable while one is alive). Wave dies when blocked, after absorbing 2 opponent hits, or if opponent is being comboed. iasa_on_hit 20. Forward force 6 at tick 12.

moves.Damage: 60 throw (40 in combo, min 10) + Poison DoT
moves.Notes: Command grab: lunges 2/tick for ticks 0-12 (plus force 15 at tick 2). Reverse input adds 5 ticks startup. Cannot feint. On grab -> BiteThrow: bite at tick 14, applies POISON at tick 11 (5 dmg every 15 ticks for 600 ticks, tracks opponent; while poisoned, each time Mutant hits or gets blocked it bursts 2 acid bubbles, 3 dmg/15 hitstun each, 35-tick cooldown; poison ends if opponent enters a combo). Release tick 24: hitstun 10, kb 10 down-forward, no knockdown.

moves.Startup: 13+ (earliest_hitbox 13; dive hitbox active from tick 4 of followup, always_on)
moves.IASA: until wall contact (endless), then followup IASA 22
moves.Notes: Leaps up-back at speed 25 from tick 4 (tick 1 if starting at wall = 3-tick wall advantage); on touching wall or timeout, dives by aim data: y=0 forward (speed 37, dir 2:0.5 -> WallTrickFollowup), diagonal |x|=1,y=1 (speed 37, dir 1.5:1 -> Followup2), straight down x=0,y=1 (speed 45 -> Followup3). Dive hit: +2, knockdown, kb 12 down, hitstun 16, can_clash false, block_cancel not allowed. WHIFFED dive -> PounceFailRoll -> Knockdown (very punishable). Landing a dive or block -> Landing. THROW INVULN ticks 0-8, PROJECTILE INVULN 1-8. force_feintable, no end feint, force_air_juke.

moves.Active: projectiles travel (each thorn hitbox live from its tick 1)
moves.Damage: 50 per thorn (15 in combo, min 4), up to 6 thorns
moves.Notes: Level 1 super. Fires a 34-degree fan of 6 Caustic Thorns aimed 45 degrees up-forward; self pushed backward (force 5 at tick 7). Thorn: hitstun 14, chip x0.5, kb 6. Super flash (default 15 freeze ticks), scales combo meter.

moves.Damage: 50 per thorn (15 in combo), up to 6 thorns
moves.Notes: Level 1 super, downward version: fires the fan DOWN and hops Mutant up (force -3 airborne; (-1,-6) if grounded). land_cancel from tick 12. force_air_juke. Backward self push force 3 at tick 7.

Level 2 super, no hitbox: instantly grants +6 juke pips AND charges Slop Dash (can_air_dash=true). Script skips from tick 1 to tick 28 of the 45-tick taunt anim, so real duration is ~18 ticks. Cannot feint. Super effect (freeze).

moves.Active: 12-14 (33x23 box); pull DetectBoxes always_on from tick 1 (up to 99 wide / 87 tall)
moves.Notes: Level 3 super. Vacuum super: detect boxes PULL the opponent toward Mutant at 1.5/tick from tick 1. On HIT or BLOCK: Mutant heals +25 HP, refreshes all air movements, +1 juke pip. Hit: +1, hitstun 20, knockback sends away-from-center, launches grounded. Whiff has screen bump/flash. force_air_juke, scales combo meter.

Aerial forward dash, speed 12, momentum reset, hold to restart (hold_restart AirDashForward). Full-forward input (data.x==100) grants +1 juke pip at frame 4. Landing a hit with the very next action after Air Dash charges Slop Dash. Usable from Jump/Dash categories too.

Mutant's replacement for the omnidirectional air dash: speed 14, friction 0.03, usable GROUNDED or AERIAL (hops off the ground), 8-way aim. REQUIRES can_air_dash charge: gained by landing a hit with the action input right after an Air Dash, or from Howl; consumed on use. force_air_juke. anim 15, land_cancel.
Ground dash speed 12, anim 15, momentum reset. Full-forward input (x==100) grants +1 juke pip at frame 4. Cancels into Dash Attack / Sneak Attack (ForwardDashAttack category). beats_backdash.
Backdash speed 7, stops at frame 10, anim 18. MUTANT-SPECIFIC: back_penalty 8 (gains sadness; penalty zeroes juke pips while active). Cannot be combined with a juke (invalid juke state).
Charge-and-release dash. MUTANT: the release state (ChargeDashForward) grants +1 juke pip at ticks 1 and 10 via HostCommands - charging dash farms pips.
Jump speed 11 (x_modifier 1.05). Mutant gains sadness for backward hops. fall_anim true.
Mutant override: speed 11 (base 16) - his super jump is barely higher than normal jump.
Speed 10 (x_modifier 1.05), back hop sadness 12/8. Mutant has 3 air movements total.

Grounded throw, techable. MUTANT throws: anim 34, release frame 18, dir_y 1.0 (slams DOWN-forward), DI modifier 1.5, custom gravity during, land_cancel min 20. Choose Forward/Back via Hold. Whiff gains no meter.
Air throw, techable. MUTANT air Forward/Back Throws: HARD KNOCKDOWN, dir_y 1.0, DI 1.5, release frame 18, land_cancel min 20. AirDownThrow also available from throw hold (dir 1.0 down, dir_x 1.0).

moves.Resource: air: consumes air dodge (once per airtime)
moves.Notes: Roll: throw+projectile invuln from tick 0, full invuln ticks 2-10. Backward roll is slower (force x0.3). MUTANT: landing_recovery 6 and a custom DOWN-ROLL option (data.y>0): +10 downward force, can land-cancel, but full invuln ends early at tick 6.

Standing block/parry. Disables aerial movement while held. Low/air variants (ParryLow, ParryAir) are auto-selected (selectable=false). Blocking disables Mutant's juke for the turn (disable_aerial_movement hides juke UI).
Meter block that pushes the attacker away. Super freeze 2. Note: push-blocking a neutral-juking Mutant cancels his juke (on_got_push_blocked).

Neutral-only burst (DefensiveBurst). VERIFIED vs Mutant.tscn: this neutral burst hitbox keeps the default beats_grab=true - it still beats grabs. The beats_grab=false nerf is only on the combo-escape Burst state (used from hitstun, BusyHurt category) and on Burst Cancel (OffensiveBurst); Mutant's Grab/AirGrab throwboxes are also beats_grab=false.
Combo-only burst cancel, iasa 15. MUTANT GATE: only usable if bc_charge is set, i.e. Mutant hit something THIS turn (cleared every turn in process_extra). beats_grab false.

moves.Move: Brace High / Brace Low / Brace Throw
moves.Notes: Defensive braces usable from hitstun (BusyHurt category), anim 60. Counter the corresponding attack height/throw.
Okizeme options from knockdown (OTG category). TechRoll = invulnerable roll (tech=true).
Grounded do-nothing for 10 ticks.
Aerial do-nothing/drift. Mutant clears the sprite animation override.
Fast-fall: 8-tick startup into SuperFall (massive downward force, land-cancellable).
MUTANT: taunt grants +2 juke pips at ticks 24, 34 and 44 (up to +6) plus the base taunt effect at 44. Interruptible on opponent turn.
Universal cancel states. WhiffInstantCancel (anim 2) lets a whiffed attack cancel into attacks/specials/supers (not movement/parry). Mutant clears WhiffInstantCancel interrupt exceptions.

stance_notes: Mutant has NO stance system (everything runs in the default 'Normal' stance). His 'modes' are resource charges instead: juke pips, Slop Dash charge (can_air_dash), and bc_charge. The Beast.gd install_ticks variable (INSTALL_TICKS=120, would relax move usability and add Grounded/Aerial cancel routes per BeastState.gd) is never set anywhere - vestigial install-super code.
quirks: 1) JUKE SYSTEM (signature): a turn-level movement modifier selected in the extra-params UI alongside any non-Defense action. Costs 2 of 10 max pips (starts with 4). Adds a burst of movement at turn start: side jukes 12 speed for 4 ticks (down 14 for 3, neutral 6-tick momentum reset, up-juke floats ~10 ticks with reduced gravity). Speed x1.25 during combos, x0.25 during fast swipes/grabs. Grounded jukes are E/W/neutral only unless the move has force_air_juke (Kick, Shred, Dash Attack, Leap Slash, Corkscrew, Pounce, Rebirth, Barrage Lo, Slop Dash...) which unlocks upward jukes; air jukes can go all 8 ways (up dirs need an air movement left). Blocked when: using Defense actions or DashBackward, opponent is comboing you, in blockstun/knockdown. 2-tick juke startup delay without initiative. PIP ECONOMY: +1 per hit landed, +1 when your attack is blocked, +2 when you parry the opponent; +2/use refunds; Howl +6; Hustle taunt up to +6; Super Dash release +2; full-forward dash inputs +1; penalty (sadness) sets pips to 0. Getting parried while juking cancels the juke and adds 5 hitlag; push block cancels neutral jukes. 2) SADNESS/PENALTY: Mutant is punished for retreating - backdash +8 penalty, back hops +12/+8, and passive penalty gain every 6 ticks while moving away from the opponent; penalty zeroes juke pips. 3) BC_CHARGE: Burst Cancel is gated - only on turns where Mutant hit something. The combo-escape Burst (from hitstun) and Burst Cancel hitboxes lose to grabs (beats_grab=false), but the neutral DefensiveBurst is NOT nerfed and still beats grabs. 4) SLOP DASH CHARGE: landing a hit with the action input immediately after Air Dash (or casting Howl) charges one Slop Dash - a 14-speed omnidirectional dash usable even from the ground. 5) PROJECTILE INVULN ON HIT: every time Mutant hits a fighter he gains projectile invulnerability (plus +1 pip + bc_charge). 6) POISON (Envenom): 600-tick DoT (5 dmg/15 ticks) that also bursts 2 acid bubbles (3 dmg) whenever Mutant hits or is blocked (35-tick cd); poison drops if the opponent gets comboed; Mutant hitting his OWN acid bubbles launches them at x2 knockback and refunds a free projectile cancel. 7) CAUSTIC SPIKE is a persistent aimable trap (120 dmg) that auto-disables if Mutant's melee is blocked or he gets launched, and can be manually disabled via the spike_enabled extra param. 8) REBIRTH (3 bars) heals 25 HP, refreshes air movements and pulls the opponent in from nearly full-screen. 9) Glass cannon stats: takes 1.1x damage, narrow 12-wide hurtbox, ground speed 16, 3 air movements. 10) Swipe is a self-chaining rekka (Swipe -> Swipe2 -> Swipe2...), and Leap Slash only hits AIRBORNE opponents.

unverified.reason: State exists in scene (type Special, selectable=false, interrupt_from Grounded/GroundedSpecial) but has an empty script, no hitboxes and no anim_length override - appears to be unused/cut content. Excluded from moves list.

unverified.move: Swipe / Swipe2 / Dash Attack damage totals
unverified.reason: Multiple overlapping hitboxes share group 0, so only one box hits per group per swing; which box (40 vs 48, or which 60) depends on spacing. Listed as ranges.
Thorns spawn 1/tick from tick 5 with swept hitboxes from projectile tick 1; time-to-hit depends on travel distance and aim, not a fixed startup.

Parent state is endless and transitions on wall contact; total time to the dive hitbox depends on stage position (3-tick discount when starting at a wall). earliest_hitbox=13 is the engine's estimate.
anim_length 45 but script jumps current_tick to 28 on frame 1; effective ~18 ticks assumed, not play-tested.

unverified.move: JumpGrab / ParryLow / ParryAir / ParryAuto / SwipeUp / AcidSlashJUp / Back Swing / GroundSpike selectability
unverified.reason: These have show_in_menu=true (default) but selectable=false or no interrupt_from category, so they do not appear as their own usable menu buttons; they are auto-variants. Variants with real frame data are still listed.

unverified.move: Inst. Cancel / Whiff Cancel resource cost
unverified.reason: Cost flows through the feint/meter system (host.feints or full super meter per CharState.can_feint logic); exact per-use cost not traced in this pass.
Referenced by BeastState.is_usable/get_interrupt_from and synced as an extra state variable, but no code path ever sets it non-zero - treated as vestigial.

Menu-visible state MISSING from moves (found in verification pass): BaseChar.tscn ParryAfterWhiff is selectable (no selectable=false) with the SAME interrupt_from list as ParryHigh (Grounded/Aerial/GroundedSpecial/AerialSpecial/GroundedDefense/AerialDefense/Parry) and the same 'Block' title/button - it is the reblock=true variant the game offers as the Block action after a whiffed/cancelled action. Frame data mirrors ParryHigh (endless, anim 20, type 4, air_type Both); treat 'Block' selected from cancel menus as this state.
